## X-Sense Home Security v1.3.13.5

### Camera Recording Notifications
- Changes X-Sense recording notification links to a Home Assistant relative playback path for the Companion app.
- Moves the playback page from `/api/xsense/playback/...` to `/xsense/playback/...`.
- Adds the camera name to Motion event data and the default blueprint notification title/message.

### Validation
- Updates regression coverage for the relative playback link and camera-name notification text.
- Confirms the camera stream implementation files remain unchanged for this prerelease.
